name: DeveloperChangeLog
description: Source of truth for tracking all development activity. Supports categorization, priority management, and technical implementation notes.

title.description: Short descriptive title of the change request.

description.description: Detailed business or functional description of the change.

status.description: Current lifecycle state of the work.

technical_notes.description: Implementation prompts, code pointers, and technical constraints.

implemented_by.description: Name or email of the developer.

created_by.description: System user who logged the request.
